defense_1.title: Defense 1
defense_1.description:
[blue]1[/blue] [color=#BA7611]Earth[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] at the start of combat.
defense_2.title: Defense 2
defense_2.description:
[blue]3[/blue] [color=#BA7611]Earth[/color]

Gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] at the start of combat.
defense_3.title: Defense 3
defense_3.description:
[blue]5[/blue] [color=#BA7611]Earth[/color]

Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] at the start of combat.
hp_1.title: HP 1
hp_1.description:
[blue]1[/blue] [color=#559AFF]Water[/color]

Raise your Max HP by [blue]4[/blue] while equipped.
hp_2.title: HP 2
hp_2.description:
[blue]3[/blue] [color=#559AFF]Water[/color]

Raise your Max HP by [blue]8[/blue] while equipped.
hp_3.title: HP 3
hp_3.description:
[blue]5[/blue] [color=#559AFF]Water[/color]

Raise your Max HP by [blue]12[/blue] while equipped.
attack_1.title: Attack 1
attack_1.description:
[blue]1[/blue] [color=#F61515]Fire[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] at the start of combat.
attack_2.title: Attack 2
attack_2.description:
[blue]3[/blue] [color=#F61515]Fire[/color]

Gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] at the start of combat.
attack_3.title: Attack 3
attack_3.description:
[blue]5[/blue] [color=#F61515]Fire[/color]

Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] at the start of combat.
evade_1.title: Evade 1
evade_1.description:
[blue]1[/blue] [color=#4EF31C]Wind[/color]

A Wind quartz. Its combat effect is not yet implemented.
evade_2.title: Evade 2
evade_2.description:
[blue]3[/blue] [color=#4EF31C]Wind[/color]

A Wind quartz. Its combat effect is not yet implemented.
evade_3.title: Evade 3
evade_3.description:
[blue]5[/blue] [color=#4EF31C]Wind[/color]

A Wind quartz. Its combat effect is not yet implemented.
cast_1.title: Cast 1
cast_1.description:
[blue]2[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional Orbal Art cast each turn.
cast_2.title: Cast 2
cast_2.description:
[blue]4[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color]

Gain [blue]2[/blue] additional Orbal Art casts each turn.
cast_3.title: Cast 3
cast_3.description:
[blue]6[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color]

Gain [blue]3[/blue] additional Orbal Art casts each turn.
ep_cut_1.title: EP Cut 1
ep_cut_1.description:
[blue]2[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Art Reduction Cost. This effect is not yet implemented.
ep_cut_2.title: EP Cut 2
ep_cut_2.description:
[blue]4[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] Art Reduction Cost. This effect is not yet implemented.
ep_cut_3.title: EP Cut 3
ep_cut_3.description:
[blue]6[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] Art Reduction Cost. This effect is not yet implemented.
ep_1.title: EP 1
ep_1.description:
[blue]2[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]1[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy at the start of your first turn. This effect is not yet implemented.
ep_2.title: EP 2
ep_2.description:
[blue]4[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]2[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy at the start of each of your first [blue]2[/blue] turns. This effect is not yet implemented.
ep_3.title: EP 3
ep_3.description:
[blue]6[/blue] [color=#E5E5E5]Mirage[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#F0E10C]Space[/color], [blue]3[/blue] [color=#131315]Time[/color]

Gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy at the start of each of your first [blue]3[/blue] turns. This effect is not yet implemented.
mind_1.title: Mind 1
ORBMENT_BUTTON.title: Battle Orbment
ORBMENT_BUTTON.description:
Click to open the Battle Orbment menu, only while outside of Combat.

Here you can change which [gold]Quartz[/gold] are slotted, granting various effects.
ChooseAnOrbalArt:
Choose an Orbal Art.
Confirm with no selection to close.
ORBAL_ARTS_BUTTON.title: Orbal Arts
ORBAL_ARTS_BUTTON.description:
Click to view your Orbal Arts.

The number shows how many casts you have left this turn.

Choose a castable Art to add it to your hand.
